page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: Metawrap is a pipeline for genome-resolved metagenomic data analysis
page_metadata.biotools__summary: MetaWRAP aims to be an easy-to-use metagenomic wrapper suite that accomplishes the core tasks of metagenomic analysis from start to finish: read quality control, assembly, visualization, taxonomic profiling, extracting draft genomes (binning), and functional annotation.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: MetaWRAP aims to be an easy-to-use metagenomic wrapper suite that accomplishes the core tasks of metagenomic analysis from start to finish: read quality control, assembly, visualization, taxonomic profiling, extracting draft genomes (binning), and functional annotation.
page_metadata.galaxy__summary: A flexible pipeline for genome-resolved metagenomic data analysis
page_metadata.galaxy__bio_tools_summary: MetaWRAP aims to be an easy-to-use metagenomic wrapper suite that accomplishes the core tasks of metagenomic analysis from start to finish: read quality control, assembly, visualization, taxonomic profiling, extracting draft genomes (binning), and functional annotation.
